subcodes.first_line: God is Most Great, God is the Incomparable One, God is the Self-Subsisting One! Acknowledging His Books and His Messengers, His chosen ones and His pure ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله اکبر الله الاحد الله الصمد معترفا بکتبه و رسله و اولیائه و اصفیائه و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
